rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RENALD D. BACIGALUPI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motin For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, November 13, 2008. Petitioner¿s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory 15.1. The interrogatory is properly directed to the denial of material allegations. The motion is granted as it seeks a privilege log. Any response which asserts privilege must identify documents withheld with specificity. That description is in fact what is known as a ¿privilege log.¿ As the responses refer to documents previously produced, those documents must be identified with particularity. The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 1 and 60 of the First Set as those requests are directed to the trustee and relate to the trust property, though not to the individual¿s personal holdings. The motion is denied as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 1 and 3 of the Second Set as they are overly broad. Any request must be limited to the trust and shall not include the assets of trustee as an individual. The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Numbers 94 and 96. The motion is denied as to Request For Production Of Documents of third set Numbers 101-103 as they invade the tax privileges of a third party. Further responses and the privilege log shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. =(EAH/612)
